48:
...Of all the blasted... Seven hells! Some beast is makin' off with <Emphasis>my</Emphasis> hard-earned chocobos afore I can gather 'em from the traps. Accounts from my men say it's one o' the biggest bears they've ever laid eyes on.

I've got a plan to lure out the greedy bugger, but I need someone reliable to take it down for me─an' there ain't many more reliable than you!
